concept: Caretaker / One Who Provides Generative Grounding
description: One who attends to the daily needs of others or a place, providing a foundation of care and support.
rationale: Composed from the established root 'ph' (generative breath) and a new proposed root 'ku' (ground, foundation). The word's structure suggests 'one who provides a generative foundation.' This frames caretaking as a vital, foundational act that allows others to flourish.
